reviews.comment:
Excelente atención de los playeros, hay un espacio para relajar con mesas y bancos. Aceptan app ypf.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the beach attendants; there's a relaxing area with tables and benches. They accept the YPF app.

reviews.comment:
De paso a Buenos Aires

(Translated by Google)
On the way to Buenos Aires
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6487110738096342413/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNUMk9PWGpRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre bien esta estación de servicios!!! Ahora estan restaurando los baños, tienen baños químicos, impecables!!! Lo recomiendo y por favor, cuando pasen, diganle a los empleados lo que está bien y agradezcanle, eso estará muy bueno

(Translated by Google)
This gas station is always great! They're currently renovating the restrooms; they have portable toilets, and they're spotless! I highly recommend it, and please, when you're there, tell the employees what's good and thank them—that would be really appreciated.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6487110738096342413/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNqdDhuVG53RRAB

reviews.comment:
Salvó los baños al que le falta limpieza, tiene un lugar muy bueno para comer y descansar.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms, which are lacking in cleanliness, are a saving grace; it has a very good place to eat and rest.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6487110738096342413/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUREMGZhLXlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
La estación está linda. A los baños les hace falta más limpieza al igual que a la zona de descanso. El personal es muy atento y servicial. El shop está equipado

(Translated by Google)
The station is nice. The restrooms need more cleaning, as does the rest area. The staff is very attentive and helpful. The shop is well-equipped.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6487110738096342413/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUREM3UtNHhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
El bar, un robo. Los baños, una vergüenza

(Translated by Google)
The bar was a rip-off. The bathrooms were a disgrace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6487110738096342413/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUREX0xxWG9BRRAB

(Translated by Google)
Dirty bathrooms. No products in the full section.

reviews.comment:
Excelentes lomitos prepararon las chicas, haría 100 km de más para ir a comerlo, muyyy biennn

(Translated by Google)
The girls prepared excellent steak sandwiches, I'd travel an extra 100 km to go and eat them, very good indeed!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6487110738096342413/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNEdmFycXhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención en la playa de combustibles es ágil y cordial. Pero no tiene opciones de comida como sanwich o propuestas simples para el viajero en el shop.

(Translated by Google)
The service at the gas station is quick and friendly. However, there are no food options like sandwiches or simple snacks for travelers in the shop.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6487110738096342413/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNEcUtuc0NnEAE
